name: Nighthunt
short_description: The original gang is back! Join Chad, Nick, Sam, Troy & Amber as they fight for survival at Silverlake Summer Camp. Nighthunt is a completely free 3v3 stealth combat game where one side defends their fort against the opposing team of infiltrators.
detailed_description:
OVERVIEW

The original gang is back! Join Chad, Nick, Sam, Troy & Amber as they fight for survival at Silverlake Summer Camp. Nighthunt is a completely free 3v3 stealth combat game where one side defends their fort against the opposing team of infiltrators.

MULTIPLAYER

Work as a team to defend or attack the base. In Nighthunt you will have to arm yourself well, and that's why at the beginning of each round, you will have limited money to choose your equipment wisely. Your game, your rules.

CLASSIC GAMEPLAY

Our goal with Nighthunt was to create a simple game that you can play casually and have fun. Some people describe it as a mix of siege with a summer camp slasher vibe.

CREEPY LOCATIONS

Nighthunt takes place in over 10 slasher film inspired locations such as summer camp, insane asylum, graveyard, highschool, and many more.

HANDMADE EQUIPMENT

Nighthunt features an arsenal of unique home made weapons built at summer camp. Who knew someone could use a Coke bottle for a flamethrower? Or a piece of chewing gum to make a Pipe Bomb? In Nighthunt there are weapons like the proximity mine, a turret, smoke grenade, taser and more!

FEATURES

  • Capture the flag game for up to 6 players.
  • 11 creepy maps that feature all sorts of nooks and cranny's to hide and ambush from.
  • 12 weapons and gadgets featuring melee and ranged combat types.
  • Loadout building system to customize your play style.
  • Simple game rules that are easy to learn.
  • No respawns. One life per round.
  • Limited ammo. Pick up ammo and weapons from dead players.
  • 15 supported languages (interface) and controller support.

For support join our discord!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Greek, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian
*languages with full audio support
